news.summary: On May 22, 2025, in New York, a press release was issued for shareholders of Cohen & Steers REIT and Preferred and Income Fund, Inc. (NYSE: RNP). The release contained details about the upcoming distribution payment on May 30, 2025, including information on the sources of the distribution. Additionally, it provided an overview of the cumulative distributions paid out by the Fund.
news.headline: Cohen & Steers RNP Fund announces sources of distribution on May 30, 2025 for shareholders. - 107 characters

news.summary: One of the most popular prediction markets by Myriad is forecasting whether Bitcoin will surpass $115,000 by the upcoming weekend. In addition to this, the platform is also featuring predictions on the performance of Coinbase and box office figures. This has attracted significant attention from users interested in cryptocurrency and financial markets, with many eager to participate in these predictions. The potential outcome of these forecasts has stirred excitement among users, with numerous individuals closely monitoring the numbers to see if the predictions come to fruition.
news.headline: Bitcoin's future price debated - Will it surpass $115K this weekend? Coinbase hack bounty prize draws attention.

news.summary: Johnson & Johnson has received FDA approval for its anti-FcRn antibody, nipocalimab, to treat generalized myasthenia gravis. Marketed as IMAAVY, the drug's approval strengthens J&J's position against competitors in the myasthenia gravis market. This move highlights the company's commitment to innovation in treatment options.
news.headline: FDA approves Johnson & Johnson's IMAAVY for myasthenia gravis, poses challenge to top players.

news.summary: On May 22, 2025, Cohen & Steers Quality Income Realty Fund, Inc. (NYSE: RQI) issued a press release for its shareholders, detailing the distribution payment set for May 30, 2025. The communication highlights the sources of this distribution and provides an overview of cumulative distributions made throughout the fiscal period.
news.headline: Cohen & Steers Quality Income Realty Fund (RQI) to pay distribution on May 30, 2025; sources disclosed. #financialnews

news.summary: Critics from both sides of the political aisle are denouncing the controversial practice of offering investors access to the president in exchange for backing his digital coin. Democrats and a portion of Republicans are labeling this move as unethical and detrimental to the integrity of the political system.
news.headline: Winners of Trump’s Memecoin contest gather for dinner, sparking controversy due to unethical sale of access to the president.

news.summary: An American tourist in the UK was drugged by a fake taxi driver who stole $123,000 in Bitcoin from his phone. After drinking at a London bar, Jacob Irwin-Cline mistakenly got into a private cab, thinking it was his Uber. The driver gave him a sedative-laced cigarette, making him pass out for 30 minutes. Upon waking up, the driver ordered Cline out, then hit him with the car and fled with his phone containing crypto access. This incident reflects a series of crimes against crypto industry figures, including kidnappings and extortion attempts. In May, a crypto exchange owner's father was held captive in France, while the Paymium CEO's family faced a kidnapping attempt in Paris. The surge in violent attacks on crypto professionals has led to heightened security measures.
news.headline: Fake Uber driver drugs US tourist in UK, robs $123K BTC. Incidents of crypto exec kidnappings rising. Paris attacks heighten security concerns.
Moscow mayor: ‘The Defense Ministry's air defense shot down six drones flying toward Moscow. Emergency services are working at the site of the crash.’
TRUMP TO INVOKE WARTIME ACT OVER US URANIUM DEPENDENCE

news.summary: Senate Democrats, including Chuck Schumer, Elizabeth Warren, and Jeff Merkley, are proposing an amendment to the GENIUS Act to prevent a U.S. president, including Donald Trump, from profiting from stablecoins like the USD1. Trump and his three sons are involved in the crypto platform World Liberty Financial, which launched USD1 in March. Critics argue that allowing stablecoins to be recognized as financial instruments in the U.S. could benefit Trump personally. A firm used USD1 to settle a $2 billion investment in Binance, potentially profiting the president's family. Democrats are also concerned about Trump hosting a dinner for those who purchased his memecoin, with attendees remaining mostly anonymous. Schumer and Warren plan responses to this conflict of interest, calling for transparency and raising concerns about potential corruption and insider trading. The connection between Trump's crypto ventures and his presidential influence is under scrutiny, with Democrats advocating for investigations and reforms.
news.headline: Senators aim to amend GENIUS Act to prevent Trump family profiting from stablecoin; Dems plan response to Trump's crypto connections - bill advanced by Senate with 18 Dem votes on May 20, USD1 stablecoin launched by WLFI in March, Dems call for investigation into Trump's ties to platform. Warren and Merkley planning actions in response to Trump hosting dinner for high memecoin purchasers at golf club. Protest expected outside the venue, Dems urge Trump to release guest list. Critics highlight potential conflicts of interest.

news.summary: Symbolized as TSX/NYSE AMERICAN: SVM, Vancouver-based Silvercorp Metals Inc. disclosed its financial and operational performance for Q4 Fiscal 2025 and Fiscal 2025. The company, known as Silvercorp, traded under the tickers TSX: SVM and NYSE American: SVM. This data showcases its quarterly and annual results for the stated periods.
news.headline: Silvercorp reports adjusted net income of $75.1M, $0.37 per share, and cash flow of $138.6M for FY 2025.

news.summary: Intouch Insight Ltd reported their financial results for the quarter ending March 31, 2025. They saw significant improvements in net earnings before taxes, reaching $289,254, a 414% increase from $69,804 in Q1 2024. EBITDA also rose to $557,748 in Q1 2025 compared to $343,843 the prior year. Recurring services revenue slightly increased by 2% to $5,359,439. Total revenue decreased by 19% to $6,319,663 due to the elimination of low-margin revenue streams. Gross margin dollars increased by 4% to $3,190,515 with a growth in margin percentage to 50.5% from 39.1%. The company's CEO, Cameron Watt, attributed these positive results to exiting low-margin revenue streams in Q1 2024. Looking ahead, the company aims to drive growth through expanding recurring services, SaaS offerings, and utilizing AI for differentiation, automation, and cost improvements. They are also considering re-entering the merchandising business.
news.headline: Intouch Insight's Q1 2025 financial results show net earnings before taxes of $289,254, an EBITDA of $557,748, and 2% increase in recurring services revenue to $5,359,439. Gross margin percentage increased by 11% to 50.5%. CEO highlights exiting low-margin revenue streams and pursuing growth opportunities.

news.summary: On May 22, 2025, Soleno Therapeutics, Inc. revealed that its Marketing Authorization Application (MAA) for Diazoxide Choline Prolonged-Release Tablets, targeted at treating individuals aged four and above with Prader-Willi syndrome (PWS) and hyperphagia, has been validated by the European Medicines Agency (EMA). Soleno, a biopharmaceutical company, is focused on developing innovative therapies for rare diseases. The company's shares are listed on the NASDAQ under the symbol SLNO. This move marks a significant step forward in potentially providing relief for individuals affected by PWS, which is a rare genetic disorder.
news.headline: Soleno submits MAA for Diazoxide Choline Tablets for hyperphagia in PWS patients aged 4+, validated by EMA.

news.summary: A recent study showcasing the effectiveness of the one-time Amtagvi treatment revealed enduring responses among patients, along with a notable five-year overall survival rate of 20%. This indicates promising outcomes for individuals undergoing this treatment, as it exhibits long-lasting benefits and a relatively positive survival rate over the course of five years.
news.headline: Iovance presents 5-year results of Amtagvi in advanced melanoma at ASCO, showing 20% overall survival rate.

news.summary: On May 22, 2025, a recent announcement was made for shareholders of Cohen & Steers Infrastructure Fund, Inc. (NYSE: UTF). The press release contains details about the upcoming distribution scheduled for May 30, 2025, shedding light on where the funds are sourced from. Additionally, it provides an overview of the total distributions made so far in the fiscal year. Shareholders can expect more specific information in the official communication.
news.headline: Cohen & Steers Infrastructure Fund (UTF) releases sources of distribution for shareholders ahead of May 30, 2025 payout.

news.summary: Sanofi has officially opened its new main offices in the US on May 22, 2025. The new state-of-the-art facility in Morristown, New Jersey aims to promote collaboration and innovation. The office is set up to facilitate the development and delivery of medicines and vaccines to patients.
news.headline: Sanofi unveils $130M NJ offices, boosts US presence with innovative design for drug development.

news.summary: A series of studies led by experts will showcase advancements in various types of cancer and explore practical insights influencing the direction of personalized cancer care. This event will take place in New Brunswick, N.J., starting on May 22, 2025. The studies will involve clinicians and researchers from RWJBarnabas Health and Rutgers Cancer Institute.
news.headline: RWJBarnabas Health & Rutgers Cancer Institute to share research at 2025 ASCO Annual Meeting, impacting personalized oncology.

news.summary: About a year after the FDA initially denied its approval submission, Abeona revealed that the agency has now given the green light for ZEVASKYN. This autologous cell-based gene therapy is authorized for use in adult and pediatric patients with RDEB. The approval signifies a significant milestone for Abeona as it marks their official foray into the commercial gene therapy market.
news.headline: Abeona gains FDA approval for ZEVASKYN gene therapy for RDEB, marking its entry into the market after a previous rejection.

news.summary: The outcomes of the KOMET-001 registration-directed trial regarding ziftomenib in relapsed/refractory NPM1-mutated acute myeloid leukemia (AML) patients have been chosen for presentation at an oral session on Monday, June 2nd. This significant development indicates progress in the study of this drug and its potential benefits for patients facing this type of AML. Stay tuned for more details on the latest findings and advancements in the field.
news.headline: Kura Oncology and Kyowa Kirin present pivotal data on Ziftomenib at 2025 ASCO Annual Meeting for AML patients.
Merus’ Petosemtamab and Pembrolizumab show strong results in treating PD-L1+ r/m HNSCC in first-line, with durable efficacy.

news.summary: Thursday afternoon saw minimal movement in the Dow Jones and other major indexes, remaining mostly stagnant. Notably, a cosmetic company's stock bounced back to approach a new peak. Live updates covered the day's stock market activity, with the Dow Jones and S&P 500 experiencing slight declines, while an IBD 50 stock surged to reach a fresh high.
news.headline: Stock indexes flat, with Dow Jones slightly down. IBD 50 stock hits new high. Beauty stock near peak.

news.summary: Founder and host of Turning Point Broadcast Ministry, Dr. David Jeremiah, has released a statement regarding the recent attack on Israeli embassy staff. The incident took place in San Diego on May 22, 2025. Dr. Jeremiah expressed his sorrow over the violence, emphasizing that any form of violence is deeply saddening. The attack has left many bewildered as to why such events persist.
news.headline: Founder of Turning Point Broadcast Ministry condemns attack on Israeli Embassy, calls for peace.

news.summary: Quebec-based Abcourt Mines Inc. (TSX Venture: ABI) (OTCQB : ABMBF) has released its Q3 results for the period ending March 31, 2025. The financial report is stated in Canadian dollars. For further details, interested parties can access the financial statements and management discussion and analysis on SEDAR.
news.headline: Abcourt Mines Inc. reports Q3 results ending on March 31, 2025 in Canadian dollars. Details available on SEDAR+.

news.summary: Houston-based Halliburton Company (NYSE: HAL) has reported a second quarter dividend of $0.17 per share on its common stock for 2025. The dividend will be paid out on June 25, 2025, to shareholders of record as of June 4, 2025. Established in 1919, Halliburton is a key player in the global energy sector, offering a wide range of products and services.
news.headline: Halliburton declares $0.17/share dividend for Q2 2025 on common stock, payable June 25. Founded in 1919, Halliburton serves energy industry.

news.summary: New data from the GAVRETO® (pralsetinib) Phase 1/2 ARROW trial show promising results in RET fusion-positive NSCLC and other solid tumors. The study supports the use of REZLIDHIA® (olutasidenib) in patients with mIDH1 R/R AML. The findings were presented in SOUTH SAN FRANCISCO, revealing significant support for the efficacy of these treatments. The results come from a study conducted by Rigel Pharmaceuticals and mark a significant advancement in the field. The data, released on May 22, 2025, show encouraging outcomes for patients with these specific types of cancer. This new information provides valuable insights into the potential benefits of GAVRETO® and REZLIDHIA® in treating these challenging conditions.
news.headline: Rigel presents final data from GAVRETO Phase 1/2 study in NSCLC at 2025 ASCO and EHA2025 Congress.

news.summary: In Lawrenceville, New Jersey on May 22, 2025, IMUNON, Inc. (NASDAQ: IMNN), a clinical-stage company in Phase 3 development with its DNA-mediated immunotherapy, announced the filing of a request for withdrawal with the Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) of the Company’s Registration Statement on Form S-1 (No. 333-286403). This registration was initially filed on April 4, 2025, but the Company has decided not to pursue a public offering under this Registration Statement at this time. It's important to note that the Registration Statement has not been approved by the SEC and no securities have been sold in relation to the offering mentioned in the Registration Statement.
news.headline: IMUNON withdraws Form S-1 Registration Statement (No. 333-286403) filed on April 4, 2025, no public offering pursued.

news.summary: In Brookings, South Dakota on May 22, 2025, a notable global company, Daktronics, Inc. (Nasdaq: DAKT), known for creating top-tier dynamic video communication displays and control systems worldwide, reported that Brad Wiemann, Interim CEO, and Howard Atkins, Acting CFO, will join the 22nd Annual Institutional Investor Conference by Craig-Hallum Capital Group. The event is scheduled for May 28th, 2025, in Minneapolis, MN.
news.headline: Daktronics to attend Craig-Hallum Institutional Investor Conference on May 28.CEO and CFO to participate in the event.

news.summary: On May 22, 2025, Allogene Therapeutics, Inc. (Nasdaq: ALLO), based in South San Francisco, revealed the release of two abstracts on the American Society of Clinical Oncology (ASCO) website prior to the 2025 ASCO Annual Meeting in Chicago, Illinois, scheduled from May 30 to June 3. The company is known for its advanced work in allogeneic CAR T (AlloCAR T ™) products aimed at treating cancer and autoimmune disorders. This proactive move aims to provide a preview of their upcoming presentations at the highly anticipated conference.
news.headline: Allogene Therapeutics to present ALLO-316 at ASCO 2025 for kidney cancer and ALPHA3 TIP for Cema-Cel at ASCO Annual Meeting.

news.summary: Legend Biotech Corporation, a global leader in cell therapy, recently revealed new data about their CARVYKTI ® (ciltacabtagene autoleucel; cilta-cel) treatment for multiple myeloma patients. This data will be showcased at the upcoming 2025 American Society of Clinical Oncology Annual Meeting and the 2025 European Hematology Association’s Congress. The company will present preliminary findings from Phase 1 LB2102 and Phase 1 LB1908 ongoing dose-escalation studies focusing on solid tumors such as lung and gastric cancers at ASCO through poster presentations. Legend Biotech Corporation is listed on the NASDAQ under LEGN.
news.headline: Legend Biotech will present new data on CARVYKTI for multiple myeloma at ASCO & EHA meetings. Preliminary results on solid tumors will also be shared.

news.summary: In an announcement made on May 22, 2025, ROHM Semiconductor revealed an increase in their selection of surface-mount near-infrared (NIR) LEDs. The expanded portfolio includes compact top-view types specifically designed for various applications such as VR/AR devices, industrial optical sensors, and human detection sensors. The new offerings aim to enhance the company's range of products catering to these industries in Santa Clara, CA and Kyoto, Japan.
news.headline: ROHM unveils new compact surface-mount NIR LEDs for VR/AR devices and sensors in expanded portfolio.

news.summary: A breakthrough in cancer treatment was announced as Cullinan Therapeutics, Inc. (Nasdaq: CGEM), Taiho Pharmaceutical Co., Ltd., and Taiho Oncology, Inc. shared positive results from the pivotal Phase 2b cohorts of the REZILIENT1 trial. This Phase 1/2 clinical trial of zipalertinib monotherapy showcased promising outcomes for patients with advanced or metastatic non-small cell lung cancer (NSCLC) with epidermal growth factor receptor (EGFR) exon 20 insertion mutations (ex20ins) who had undergone previous therapy. The findings will be presented at the 2025 American Society of Clinical Oncology (ASCO) Annual Meeting on June 1 during the “Lung Cancer – Non-Small Cell Metastatic” session from 9:00 AM-9:12 AM CDT (Abstract #8503).
news.headline: Positive results from REZILIENT1 trial of zipalertinib for NSCLC with EGFR ex20ins will be presented at ASCO 2025.

Known for offering critical, real-time video networking and visual collaboration solutions worldwide, Haivision is listed on the Toronto Stock Exchange under the ticker symbol HAI. news.summary: On May 22, 2025, M-tron Industries, Inc. (NYSE American: MPTI) disclosed plans for its 2025 Annual Meeting of Stockholders, scheduled for June 10, 2025, in New York City. The upcoming Annual Meeting is a significant event for Mtron, providing an opportunity for shareholders to engage with the company's leadership.
news.headline: M-tron Industries, Inc. to hold investor presentation and annual meeting of stockholders on June 10, 2025 in NYC.

news.summary: Webull Corp (NASDAQ: BULL) saw a decline in after-hours trading following the release of its first-quarter financial results. The company reported Q1 revenue of $117.37 million, marking a 32% increase from the previous year's $88.94 million. This growth was primarily driven by a surge in account numbers and trading volumes. Despite the revenue boost, Webull reported a loss of six cents per share for the quarter. Additionally, total customer assets saw a significant 45% increase year-over-year. For more details, readers can access the complete article on Benzinga.com.
news.headline: Webull Q1 earnings: Revenue $117.37M, up 32% YoY, loss 6 cents/share. Shares slide post-results.

news.summary: Guardant Health, Inc., a prominent precision oncology company listed on Nasdaq under GH, revealed plans to share findings from over 19 studies at the 2025 American Society for Clinical Oncology (ASCO) Annual Meeting in Chicago. The data to be presented includes significant insights from the Phase 3 SERENA-6 trial. This trial showcases the pivotal contribution of Guardant's liquid biopsy tests in various aspects of cancer management, such as screening, therapy selection, and recurrence monitoring. The range and depth of the data signify the importance of Guardant's innovative approaches in advancing oncology research and patient care.
news.headline: Guardant Health to present data from 19+ studies at ASCO Annual Meeting, showcasing liquid biopsy's role in precision oncology.

news.summary: Intuit, a financial software company, exceeded Wall Street's expectations in its fiscal third quarter primarily due to a successful tax-preparation season. This led to an impressive performance in the April quarter, showcasing Intuit's strong performance in the tax-prep business. The company's positive results for the quarter reflect robust figures surpassing analysts' forecasts.
news.headline: Intuit exceeded Wall Street's expectations in Q3 due to strong tax-prep season, driving business success.

news.summary: Following the release of its Q1 earnings report, Workday's stock experienced a decline. Despite reporting earnings that exceeded estimates, the software maker had initially set lower expectations. While the guidance provided was in line with expectations, the stock fell following the news.
news.headline: Workday stock falls despite Q1 earnings beating estimates due to lowered expectations, guidance meets expectations.

news.summary: Autodesk exceeded analyst expectations for its fiscal Q1 and provided a forecast that surpasses current projections. The stock saw a significant increase in after-hours trading. The post highlights Autodesk's strong performance in Q1.
news.headline: Autodesk surpasses Q1 estimates, predicts higher earnings; stock soars in after-hours trading.

news.summary: Beaver Hollow Wellness has decided to retract its candidates for the Board of Directors, effectively halting the proxy contest. To ensure your vote is included, make sure to vote using the BLUE proxy card. This development was announced in Elma, N.Y., on May 22, 2025, through Servotronics, Inc. (NYSE American – SVT).
news.headline: Servotronics ends proxy contest as Beaver Hollow Wellness withdraws nominees for the Board of Directors. Vote now on BLUE proxy card.

news.summary: The article discusses the potential impact of the SEC’s decision on a spot XRP ETF on the cryptocurrency market. Currently, there is $2.2 billion in XRP futures, indicating growing institutional investor demand. XRP has underperformed the market despite bullish events in 2025. XRP's price fell 6% in the past three months, while the overall crypto market capitalization rose 10%. There is hope for a 45% rally to $3.50, with rising confidence in derivatives metrics. The open interest on XRP futures has increased to 923 million XRP, with leveraged positions signaling growing institutional interest. The funding rate for XRP futures reached 19% on May 22, showing optimism. Ripple Labs settling a complaint with the SEC leads to favorable regulations, potentially paving the way for partnerships and acquisitions. Historically, XRP has reacted positively to such announcements, with the potential for its price to surpass the $3.25 all-time high. The final decision on the spot XRP ETF by the SEC is expected in October. The article does not constitute legal or investment advice.
news.headline: XRP price lags despite optimistic developments: $2.2B in futures, potential ETF listing. Key $3.50 target, but uncertain SEC decision.

news.summary: In Marlborough, Massachusetts, Hologic is set to showcase new findings at ASCO 2025 that emphasize the significant impact of the Breast Cancer Index® Test. This presentation aims to highlight the test's practice-changing implications, solidified by the latest data. Keep an eye out for the event to glean insights into how this innovative test is shaping the approach to breast cancer.
news.headline: Hologic will present at ASCO 2025 on Breast Cancer Index® Test's role in delivering personalized care.

news.summary: In Calgary, Alberta, on May 22, 2025, Petrus Resources Ltd. (TSX: PRQ) shared that all resolutions were successfully approved by shareholders at its recent annual general meeting. The meeting took place yesterday, and Petrus expressed contentment with the outcome. The company, often referred to as "Petrus," disclosed that the resolutions passed included critical decisions.
news.headline: Petrus Resources Ltd. (TSX: PRQ) shareholders approve all resolutions at annual general meeting on May 22, 2025.

news.summary: Actuate Therapeutics, a biopharmaceutical company listed on NASDAQ as ACTU, headquartered in Chicago and Fort Worth, made an announcement on May 22, 2025, about their focus on developing cancer treatments by targeting glycogen synthase kinase-3 beta (GSK-3β). The Company revealed the online publication of an abstract selected for an oral presentation at the upcoming 2025 American Society of Clinical Oncology (ASCO) Annual Meeting in Chicago, Illinois, from May 30 to June 3.
news.headline: Actuate Therapeutics to present Phase 2 data on Elraglusib at ASCO Annual Meeting for pancreatic cancer treatment.
